error_signature: webhook and callback URLs missing https://
title: Webhook and callback URLs missing HTTPS prefix
symptom: After updating n8n, new webhook and callback URLs are generated without the 'https://' prefix, causing failures in OAuth connections.
root_cause: The update to n8n changed how certain environment variables are handled, leading to the omission of the 'https://' prefix in newly generated URLs. Some environment variables are no longer necessary and need to be adjusted.
fix_steps: Update the environment variables to remove unnecessary ones and ensure correct settings:
Restart the n8n container or host.
agent_instruction: Update the environment variables and restart your n8n instance.
